/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/tse.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tse.dir/src/assets/Stock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tse.dir/src/assets/Crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tse.dir/src/assets/ETF.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tse.dir/src/accounts/PlayerTrader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tse.dir/src/accounts/AdminAccount.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tse.dir/src/engine/MarketEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tse.dir/src/ui/Terminal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tse.dir/src/ui/Menu.cpp.o -o tse
